content.claim: A documented case study shows local coalitions can save a school, but success is contingent on rare social capital (bonding and bridging networks within villages).
content.context: Fresh live research through the Political feasibility lens
limitations: Single case study; not generalizable to other villages without similar social-capital profiles
No systematic mapping of which villages possess or lack such networks
Case study does not provide predictive model for identifying rescuable villages
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
